sutta: Buddha said monks I know not of any other single person who so perfectly keeps rolling the supreme wheel of Dhamma set rolling by the Tathāgata as does Sāriputta is the one who perfectly keeps rolling the supreme wheel of Dhamma set rolling by the Tathāgata.
commentary: As you all probably know the Tathāgata is another word for the Buddha the Tathāgata means the dust corn one this sutta I choose to mention it not because it has some a lot of dharma content but because there are some books in them in the mahayana sutras that seem to say the opposite thing for example in the lotus sutra they try to say that the Buddha that the Sāriputta being and arahan did not understand the teachings of the Buddha and instead they tried to show that all the bodhisattvas understood the real teachings of the Buddha whereas.
